section.div: Browser-native Office / PDF / CAD / archive viewer for internal web apps, with Vue, React, Svelte, jQuery, Web Components, and no server-side conversion.

🎨 The open-source Claude Design alternative. 🖥️ Local-first desktop app. 🖼️ Your coding agent becomes the design engine: prototypes, landing pages, dashboards, slides, images & video — real files, HTML/PDF/PPTX/MP4 export. 🤖 Claude Code / Codex / Cursor / Gemini / OpenCode / Qwen & 20+ CLIs via BYOK.
📱 Android app providing ⚡ REST API for call management - companion to SMSGate app 🔀
The SMS Gateway for Android™ app enables sending and receiving SMS messages through an API that can be accessed directly on the device or via a cloud server when direct device access is not possible.
